allow:
Bash(cat > /tmp/sbridge_work/generate_all.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
set -o pipefail

WORKDIR="/tmp/sbridge_work"
OUTDIR="$HOME/Documents/Agent/agents/Sources/ScriptingBridges"
SBHC="/tmp/Swift-Scripting/sbhc.py"

cd "$WORKDIR"

# Clean previous intermediate files
rm -f *.sdef *.h *.swift 2>/dev/null

# Restore Calendar and Contacts which already succeeded - regenerate them
declare -A APPS
# System/Applications
APPS["Calendar"]="/System/Applications/Calendar.app"
APPS["Contacts"]="/System/Applications/Contacts.app"
APPS["FaceTime"]="/System/Applications/FaceTime.app"
APPS["Freeform"]="/System/Applications/Freeform.app"
APPS["Mail"]="/System/Applications/Mail.app"
APPS["Maps"]="/System/Applications/Maps.app"
APPS["Messages"]="/System/Applications/Messages.app"
APPS["Music"]="/System/Applications/Music.app"
APPS["News"]="/System/Applications/News.app"
APPS["Notes"]="/System/Applications/Notes.app"
APPS["Photos"]="/System/Applications/Photos.app"
APPS["Podcasts"]="/System/Applications/Podcasts.app"
APPS["Preview"]="/System/Applications/Preview.app"
APPS["Reminders"]="/System/Applications/Reminders.app"
APPS["Safari"]="/System/Applications/Safari.app"
APPS["Shortcuts"]="/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"
APPS["Stocks"]="/System/Applications/Stocks.app"
APPS["TV"]="/System/Applications/TV.app"

# Utilities
APPS["Terminal"]="/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app"
APPS["ScriptEditor"]="/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app"
APPS["Automator"]="/System/Applications/Utilities/Automator.app"
APPS["DiskUtility"]="/System/Applications/Utilities/Disk Utility.app"

# Applications folder
APPS["Xcode"]="/Applications/Xcode.app"

# CoreServices
APPS["Finder"]="/System/Library/CoreServices/Finder.app"
APPS["SystemEvents"]="/System/Library/CoreServices/System Events.app"
APPS["ImageEvents"]="/System/Library/CoreServices/Image Events.app"

# Try Keynote/Numbers/Pages in both locations
for app in Keynote Numbers Pages; do
    if [ -d "/Applications/${app}.app" ]; then
        APPS["$app"]="/Applications/${app}.app"
    elif [ -d "/System/Applications/${app}.app" ]; then
        APPS["$app"]="/System/Applications/${app}.app"
    fi
done

SUCCEEDED=""
FAILED=""
SKIPPED=""

for BASENAME in $\(echo "${!APPS[@]}" | tr ' ' '\\n' | sort\); do
    APP_PATH="${APPS[$BASENAME]}"
    
    # Check if app exists
    if [ ! -d "$APP_PATH" ]; then
        SKIPPED="$SKIPPED\\n  $BASENAME - app not found at $APP_PATH"
        continue
    fi
    
    # Step 1: sdef
    sdef "$APP_PATH" > "${BASENAME}.sdef" 2>/tmp/sbridge_work/sdef_err.txt
    SDEF_EXIT=$?
    
    # Check if sdef produced valid output
    if [ $SDEF_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ ! -s "${BASENAME}.sdef" ] || grep -q "couldn't get sdef" "${BASENAME}.sdef" 2>/dev/null; then
        SKIPPED="$SKIPPED\\n  $BASENAME - no AppleScript support \(sdef failed\)"
        rm -f "${BASENAME}.sdef"
        continue
    fi
    
    # Check if sdef contains actual XML
    if ! head -1 "${BASENAME}.sdef" | grep -q '<?xml\\|<dictionary\\|<suite'; then
        # Might have error text at top, check more carefully
        if ! grep -q '<dictionary' "${BASENAME}.sdef"; then
            SKIPPED="$SKIPPED\\n  $BASENAME - sdef output is not valid XML"
            rm -f "${BASENAME}.sdef"
            continue
        fi
    fi
    
    # Step 2: sdp
    sdp -fh --basename "$BASENAME" "${BASENAME}.sdef" 2>/tmp/sbridge_work/sdp_err.txt
    if [ $? -ne 0 ] || [ ! -f "${BASENAME}.h" ]; then
        ERR=$\(cat /tmp/sbridge_work/sdp_err.txt 2>/dev/null\)
        FAILED="$FAILED\\n  $BASENAME - sdp failed: $ERR"
        rm -f "${BASENAME}.sdef" "${BASENAME}.h"
        continue
    fi
    
    # Step 3: sbhc.py
    python3 "$SBHC" "${BASENAME}.h" 2>/tmp/sbridge_work/sbhc_err.txt
    if [ $? -ne 0 ] || [ ! -f "${BASENAME}.swift" ]; then
        ERR=$\(cat /tmp/sbridge_work/sbhc_err.txt 2>/dev/null\)
        FAILED="$FAILED\\n  $BASENAME - sbhc.py failed: $ERR"
        rm -f "${BASENAME}.sdef" "${BASENAME}.h"
        continue
    fi
    
    # Step 4: Copy to output
    cp "${BASENAME}.swift" "$OUTDIR/"
    SUCCEEDED="$SUCCEEDED\\n  $BASENAME"
    
    # Clean intermediate files
    rm -f "${BASENAME}.sdef" "${BASENAME}.h"
done

echo ""
echo "========================================="
echo "RESULTS"
echo "========================================="
echo ""
echo "SUCCEEDED \($\(echo -e "$SUCCEEDED" | grep -c '[A-Za-z]'\)\):"
echo -e "$SUCCEEDED"
echo ""
echo "SKIPPED \($\(echo -e "$SKIPPED" | grep -c '[A-Za-z]'\)\):"
echo -e "$SKIPPED"
echo ""
echo "FAILED \($\(echo -e "$FAILED" | grep -c '[A-Za-z]'\)\):"
echo -e "$FAILED"
echo ""
echo "========================================="
echo "Files in output directory:"
ls -1 "$OUTDIR/"
SCRIPT
chmod +x /tmp/sbridge_work/generate_all.sh)
Bash(cd ~/Documents/Agent/agents && swift build --target ScriptingBridges 2>&1 | grep "error:" | head -10)
Bash(grep -h "protocol.*Application:" Agent/ScriptingBridges/*.swift | sed 's/@objc public protocol //' | sed 's/:.*//')

Bash(cp /Users/toddbruss/Documents/GitHub/Agent/Agent/ExampleScripts/generate_bridge/main.swift /Users/toddbruss/Documents/Agent/agents/Sources/generate_bridge/main.swift && swift build --product generate_bridge 2>&1 && .build/debug/generate_bridge /System/Applications/Mail.app /tmp 2>&1 && grep "NS_RETURNS" /tmp/Mail.swift; echo "NS_RETURNS check: $?")

Bash(OUT="Sources/ScriptingBridges"

swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Automator.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Calendar.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Contacts.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Library/CoreServices/Finder.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Mail.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Messages.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Music.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Notes.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /Applications/Numbers.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /Applications/Pages.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Photos.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Reminders.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Shortcuts.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge '/System/Library/CoreServices/System Events.app' "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /System/Applications/TV.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1 &&
swift run generate_bridge /Applications/Xcode.app "$OUT" 2>&1 | tail -1)

Bash(cd /Users/toddbruss/Documents/Agent/agents
OUT="Sources/ScriptingBridges"

for entry in \\
  "/System/Applications/Automator.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Calendar.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Contacts.app" \\
  "/System/Library/CoreServices/Finder.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Mail.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Messages.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Music.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Notes.app" \\
  "/Applications/Numbers.app" \\
  "/Applications/Pages.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Photos.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Reminders.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app" \\
  "/System/Library/CoreServices/System Events.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" \\
  "/System/Applications/TV.app" \\
  "/Applications/Xcode.app"; do
  echo "=== $entry ==="
  swift run generate_bridge "$entry" "$OUT" 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
done)

Bash(cd ~/Documents/Agent/agents/Sources && mv check_mail CheckMail && mv generate_bridge GenerateBridge && mv hello Hello && mv list_notes ListNotes && mv list_reminders ListReminders && mv now_playing NowPlaying && mv organize_emails OrganizeEmails && mv organize_other_subcategories OrganizeOtherSubcategories && mv organize_other_subcategories_backup OrganizeOtherSubcategoriesBackup && mv running_apps RunningApps && mv scan_other_for_subcategories ScanOtherForSubcategories && mv test_generate_bridge TestGenerateBridge && mv today_events TodayEvents)

Bash(cd ~/Documents/Agent/agents/Sources && mv CheckMail/CheckMail.swift Scripts/ && mv GenerateBridge/GenerateBridge.swift Scripts/ && mv Hello/Hello.swift Scripts/ && mv ListNotes/ListNotes.swift Scripts/ && mv ListReminders/ListReminders.swift Scripts/ && mv NowPlaying/NowPlaying.swift Scripts/ && mv OrganizeEmails/OrganizeEmails.swift Scripts/ && mv OrganizeOtherSubcategories/OrganizeOtherSubcategories.swift Scripts/ && mv RunningApps/RunningApps.swift Scripts/ && mv ScanOtherForSubcategories/ScanOtherForSubcategories.swift Scripts/ && mv TestGenerateBridge/TestGenerateBridge.swift Scripts/ && mv TodayEvents/TodayEvents.swift Scripts/)
Bash(cd ~/Documents/Agent/agents/Sources/XCFScriptingBridges && for d in */; do mv "$d"*.swift . 2>/dev/null; done && rm -rf */  && ls *.swift | sort)
